originalTitle: Slot's Isak gamble backfires as Liverpool trophy hopes end
originalDescription: Arne Slot's gamble to start Alexander Isak against PSG backfires with his own future also in the balance after a Champions League exit.

originalTitle: Are Kompany's Bayern a glimpse at football after Guardiola?
originalDescription: With Vincent Kompany making an impressive impact at Bayern Munich, BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan takes a closer look at the manager's unique style.

originalTitle: Refereeing v Atletico 'a robbery' - Barca's Raphinha
originalDescription: Barcelona's exit from the Champions League quarter-finals was "a robbery", says their forward Raphinha.

originalTitle: John Terry and Colchester - why now, and why are ex-pros buying clubs?
originalDescription: BBC Sport explores John Terry's imminent takeover of Colchester, why ex-pros are buying clubs, and what the feeling is among fans.

originalTitle: Does it matter if Wrexham don't get promoted this season?
originalDescription: BBC Sport examines whether it matters if Wrexham don't seal promotion to the Premier League this season at the first time of asking.

originalTitle: Why Bellingham can rescue Real Madrid's Euro dream
originalDescription: Jude Bellingham was behind Real Madrid's late resurgence against Bayern Munich last week in their Champions League first-leg tie, and could be key in Wednesday's return.

originalTitle: Man Utd watch Bournemouth pair - Wednesday's gossip
originalDescription: Manchester United watch Premier League pair, Bayern Munich want Harry Kane's England team-mate, plus who is next for the Bournemouth job.

originalTitle: Slot fears Ekitike injury is 'really bad'
originalDescription: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says Hugo Ekitike's injury 'looks really bad' after the France striker was taken off on a stretcher during Tuesday's Champions League loss to Paris St-Germain.

originalTitle: Itoje: England can achieve 'special things' under Borthwick
originalDescription: Maro Itoje has reaffirmed his support for Steve Borthwick, insisting England can achieve "special things" under his leadership despite an abject Six Nations.

originalTitle: Milan's San Siro could host Wimbledon tune-up event on grass from 2028
originalDescription: Italy will host a grass-court ATP 250 Wimbledon tune-up event in Milan starting in 2028 - and it could be played at Milan's San Siro stadium.

originalTitle: Red Roses star Kildunne speaks of struggle with body dysmorphia
originalDescription: England rugby star Ellie Kildunne has revealed her struggle with body dysmorphia that developed during the coronavirus lockdown in 2020.

originalTitle: Missed chances, injuries, VAR - Are Slot's complaints after CL exit fair?
originalDescription: We take a look at Arne Slot's post-match news conference after Liverpool's Champions League exit to Paris St-Germain to see how the Dutchman's reasoning for the Reds' struggles this season stacks up...

originalTitle: Stokes feels 'lucky' to escape further harm after training incident
originalDescription: Ben Stokes has admitted he feels "lucky" to have escaped more serious harm after being hit in the face by a cricket ball.

originalTitle: Trail Blazers clinch NBA playoff spot as Hornets beat Heat in overtime
originalDescription: The Portland Trail Blazers clinched a playoff spot with a comeback victory over the Phoenix Suns on Tuesday, while the Charlotte Hornets advanced in the NBA's play-in tournament with a thrilling overtime win over the Miami Heat.

originalTitle: McKenna on shortlist but Rose frontrunner to replace Iraola at Bournemouth
originalDescription: Marco Rose is believed to be the frontrunner for the Bournemouth job.

originalTitle: Slot: Liverpool need to sell before buying
originalDescription: Arne Slot says Liverpool will need to raise funds through sales before they can make any new signings this summer.
